entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'I apologize for the confusion! You're right, I got carried away with the architectural discussion and forgot about our current project context.

Thank you for summarizing the current status and providing options forward. Based on our conversation, I would like to focus on implementing the architectural refactoring discussed (DIP, async workflow, etc.) for the existing codebase.

Please help me integrate the Dependency Inversion Principle (DIP) into the RawrXD Qt IDE project, focusing on the settings and project explorer components. This will ensure a more modular and maintainable architecture for our application.

Once we've completed this refactoring step, we can then focus on integrating the settings UI into MainWindow and exploring other features and improvements.

Thank you for your understanding, and I look forward to tackling this architectural refactoring task with your help!'
